rpi-workflow.description: Research-Plan-Implement workflow for structured task execution

phase.name: research
phase.objective: Understand the problem space before proposing solutions

steps.step: Review existing patterns in the codebase
Check for related ADRs or documentation

phase.name: implement

steps.step: Implement one step at a time

phase.validation: All tests pass, code review approved

pivot-handling.trigger: When implementation reveals plan is incorrect
pivot-handling.action: Create ADR documenting the pivot rationale
